name: hearyourvoice
description: Turn one topic into one finished video: research, script, an adversarial agent debate over the hook/punchline, ElevenLabs voiceover as the master clock, footage (self-shot, Creative-Commons, or generative), a timecoded editor-neutral timeline, and one packaged delivery folder. Format- and editor-agnostic. Ships a 15-strong hyv-* subagent team led by hyv-producer. The reasoning half (research, script, debate) runs anywhere; the machine half (ffprobe, yt-dlp, ffmpeg, your editor) needs Claude Code.
